legal_resources.name: Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE)
legal_resources.description: Primary government agency for labor policy, standards enforcement, and dispute resolution.

legal_resources.name: Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA)
legal_resources.description: Regulates overseas employment and protects OFWs from illegal recruitment.

legal_resources.name: Department of Migrant Workers (DMW)
legal_resources.description: Consolidated agency for OFW welfare, replacing functions of POEA and OWWA.

legal_resources.name: National Labor Relations Commission (NLRC)
legal_resources.description: Quasi-judicial body that resolves labor disputes including illegal dismissal and money claims.

legal_resources.name: Overseas Workers Welfare Administration (OWWA)
legal_resources.description: Provides welfare programs and assistance to OFWs and their families.

legal_resources.name: Public Attorney's Office (PAO)
legal_resources.description: Free legal assistance for workers who cannot afford private lawyers.

legal_resources.name: National Wages and Productivity Commission (NWPC)
legal_resources.description: Sets minimum wage rates and promotes productivity improvement.

key_laws.name: Labor Code of the Philippines (PD 442)
key_laws.description: Foundational law governing employment, working conditions, and labor relations.

key_laws.name: Migrant Workers Act (RA 10022)
key_laws.description: Protects OFWs from illegal recruitment and ensures minimum employment standards abroad.

key_laws.name: Anti-Illegal Recruitment Act
key_laws.description: Criminalizes illegal recruitment, especially large-scale and syndicated recruitment.

key_laws.name: Occupational Safety and Health Standards Act (RA 11058)
key_laws.description: Mandates safe working conditions and employer accountability for workplace hazards.

key_laws.name: Social Security Act (RA 11199)
key_laws.description: Provides social security coverage for private sector workers including gig workers.

key_laws.name: Telecommuting Act (RA 11165)
key_laws.description: Establishes framework for telecommuting arrangements with equal treatment provisions.
